perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing in front of a refrigerated display case in a Costco warehouse; one is wearing a white dress and a navy beret, the other a black top. They hold a large pizza box and gesture excitedly towards the camera. (2) The camera zooms in on several boxes of 'Seafood Supreme Pizza' on the shelf. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor dining setting where the same two women are holding slices of the cooked pizza, pointing out the specific toppings like shrimp and squid. (4) Close-up shots of the pizza reveal melting cheese, large shrimp, and green peppers. One woman takes a bite with a satisfied facial expression, nodding and giving a thumbs-up gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin, sounding excited and welcoming. (2) The same voice continues as the music maintains a steady, rhythmic beat; environmental sounds of a warehouse (faint background chatter) are present but muffled by the voiceover. (3) The audio shifts to a cleaner indoor acoustic environment. The female voice becomes more descriptive, highlighting specific ingredients with rising intonation to show surprise. (4) The music continues at the same volume until the end, punctuated by the sounds of the women reacting with 'oohs' and 'aahs' as they taste the food.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout the first half. (2) Hook Text: '海鮮總匯披薩' (Seafood Supreme Pizza) in large yellow and red stylized font. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue, e.g., '349元裡面有蝦子蛤蜊肉跟透抽' ($349 includes shrimp, clam meat, and squid). (4) Decorative Text: '非常爽脆的口感' (Very crispy texture) and '我們給它8分' (We give it 8 points) appear with flame or sparkle stickers for emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Close-up of product -> Tasting at home -> Rating and summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators/reviewers appearing in both store and home scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a white lace dress and a navy blue Kangol beret. The other has long dark hair and is wearing a black cold-shoulder top with red tassel earrings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first scene is a brightly lit Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves full of pre-packaged food. The second scene is a warm-toned indoor room with a table and soft lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio-like lighting in the store, warm domestic lighting at home.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a fast-paced, enthusiastic review of the 'Seafood Supreme Pizza' from Costco. It leverages the excitement of finding a value-packed item in-store and then validates the purchase through a taste test, ultimately recommending the product to viewers by giving it a high numerical score.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the retailer and the specific product, showcasing the brand logo and providing price information while giving a positive recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Dual-host female chemistry, high-density colorful text overlays, and fast-paced editing characteristic of Taiwanese food vloggers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'Costco' brand authority to attract viewers interested in warehouse deals and food recommendations.
